article.title: OurDream AI Review – Is It the Best AI Companion Platform?
article.description: OurDream AI review 2026: pricing, features, and real limitations explained.

blocks.body:
## What Is OurDream.ai?

OurDream.ai is an AI companion platform where users create customizable AI companions — called dream companions — and interact through chat, image generation, video generation, and voice calls. The company claims over 10 million users and 7 million user-generated characters available to browse.

The platform functions as a judgment-free environment and unique environment for companionship exploration, fantasy exploration, and role-playing. It supports both realistic and anime art styles, allows NSFW content for adults, and focuses heavily on customization — personality, appearance, voice, occupation, and relationship type. For adults interested in using OurDream.ai as a chat partner or virtual AI girlfriend, the platform positions itself as a playground for desires with an unfiltered experience tailored to your preferences. Searching for an **OurDream AI review** brings up a lot of promotional content, so this covers what the platform actually delivers.

## OurDream.ai Features

### Character Creation and Customization Options

This is where OurDream.ai puts most of its effort. The character creator includes:

- Over 40 personality types — or build your own
- 135 occupation choices
- 29 relationship types from casual to committed
- 19 voice options
- Appearance customization covering ethnicity, skin tone, eye color, hair color, body type, and more

The result is a customizable virtual partner that reflects your preferences — from realistic visuals to anime-style appearances, and from specific personality behaviors to mood settings. The platform supports endless customization: users can set their virtual companion's behavior, adjust its personality, and configure its preferred mood for different kinds of interactions. Premium subscribers get custom prompting with weighted descriptors for precise character control, creating a genuinely personalized AI experience tailored to how you want your virtual companion to behave. Creating a character costs 5 dreamcoins, which covers the full setup.

### Chat and Memory

Both subscription tiers include unlimited messaging with no per-message limits. The platform emphasizes a memory system where companions learn from conversations over time and adapt their responses. In practice, this means longer sessions feel more coherent than platforms that reset context frequently.

For comparison, platforms like Candy.ai have faced criticism for repetitive responses. OurDream.ai's memory-based system is designed to reduce that problem, though results depend on how consistently you interact with the same companion. The memory system is one of the most meaningful features for users seeking virtual companionship that feels continuous rather than transactional.

### Image and Video Generation

Image and video generation are available on both plans and consume dreamcoins from your monthly allowance. The monthly plan gives 1,000 dreamcoins and the yearly plan gives 2,000 per month. Each generation typically costs between 10–30 dreamcoins depending on complexity.

Both realistic and anime styles are both available.

Photo uploads are not allowed — a deliberate policy to prevent deepfakes. You can describe what you want in custom prompts, but you cannot upload reference images.

### Voice Calls

Voice calls are included in both subscription tiers and use the voice you selected during character creation. Calls consume dreamcoins, so heavy voice users on the lower-coin monthly plan will need to budget their usage. There is no standalone mobile app — OurDream.ai is web-only.

## OurDream.ai Roleplay and Fantasy Exploration

OurDream.ai is designed primarily for adventurous role-playing across a wide range of custom scenarios. Users can configure their virtual companion to take on multiple roles — a partner, a fantasy character, or a custom creation for a specific virtual relationship.

The variety of moods and personality settings available during character creation means the virtual partner can shift tone across sessions. The 29 relationship types and 40+ personality presets create a wide surface area for custom scenarios, including intense interactions that other platforms restrict.

The platform's judgment-free environment extends to the role-playing system. You are not limited to a narrow set of interaction styles. Users exploring diverse virtual relationship types will find more flexibility here than on most competitor platforms, which tend to limit scenario types.

## Uncensored Content Generation

For adults who have verified their age, OurDream.ai permits uncensored image generation and uncensored video generation. Both are available on all paid plans and consume dreamcoins from your monthly allowance.

The platform positions itself as a judgment-free environment for exploring fantasies through personalized dream companions. Your virtual partner can participate in explicit scenarios through chat, and you can generate visual content to match. The unfiltered experience with AI companions is a core part of the platform's value proposition for adult users.

Photo uploads are not permitted — a deliberate policy to prevent deepfakes. OurDream.ai does not have a free version with meaningful access to these features. The uncensored image generation and video generation capabilities are exclusively for verified adult subscribers.

## OurDream.ai Pricing

OurDream.ai offers flexible pricing options to suit your needs:

| Feature | Yearly Plan | Monthly Plan |
|---|---|---|
| Price | $9.99/month ($119.88/year) | $19.99/month |
| Dreamcoins | 2,000/month | 1,000/month |
| Unlimited chat | Yes | Yes |
| Image and video generation | Yes (uses dreamcoins) | Yes (uses dreamcoins) |
| Voice calls | Yes (uses dreamcoins) | Yes (uses dreamcoins) |

**What browsing access gives you:** Unsubscribed users can explore character profiles and browse the community library of 7 million user-created dream companions. You cannot chat or generate content without a paid subscription. Start with a free version to explore the basics, then upgrade to premium monthly subscriptions or annual subscriptions for access to advanced features and unlimited interactions.

**Choosing between plans:** The yearly plan at $9.99/month saves $120 over a year compared to month-to-month billing at $19.99. You also get double the dreamcoin allowance (2,000 vs. 1,000 monthly). The annual subscription is the clear better value for committed use. The monthly plan at $19.99 makes sense if you want to test the platform without a year-long commitment.

Payment is by credit card only. PayPal is not supported. A referral program exists that awards some credits, but it is not a meaningful substitute for a subscription.

## OurDream.ai Privacy and Security

OurDream.ai states that chats and personal information are protected through end-to-end encryption. The platform prohibits material involving minors, deepfakes of real people, and celebrity lookalikes — violations result in account removal.

What this means in practice:

- Conversations and personal details are stored on OurDream.ai's servers, as with any cloud-based service
- The encryption protects personal information in chats and conversations in transit
- Age verification is required before accessing NSFW content
- Privacy and security are enforced at the account level through active content moderation

## Platform Access and Updates

OurDream.ai is an actively evolving platform. Regular updates have expanded the platform across three core areas since launch: character customization depth, content generation quality, and the AI companion interaction system. Platform growth reflects this active development — the platform claims over 10 million users and 7 million user-generated dream companions.

### How the Platform Has Evolved

New features have been added progressively. Key additions since the early platform version include:

- **Video generation** — users can now generate short animated clips of their AI companions, not just static images
- **Voice calls** — real-time voice interaction using one of 19 voice presets, added to improve the companion relationship experience
- **Memory system improvements** — the AI companion now retains context from past sessions more coherently, creating a more continuous virtual relationship
- **Expanded character customization** — premium subscribers gained access to custom prompting and personality weighting, enabling a more personalized AI experience

These are not cosmetic updates. Each one meaningfully increases what the platform delivers for users seeking virtual companionship, creative content generation, or a more realistic AI partner experience.

### Subscription Access

The platform does not offer a meaningful free version — new users must subscribe before accessing interactive features. Both premium monthly subscriptions and annual subscriptions include unlimited interactions with no per-message fees. Annual subscriptions offer a significant cost discount. As the platform grows, new features are added to existing tiers, so subscribers benefit from regular updates without paying more over time.

## What OurDream.ai Does Well

**Endless customization for AI companions.** 40+ personality types, 135 occupations, 29 relationship types, and 19 voice options gives users endless possibilities that most competitor platforms do not offer. For users who want an AI girlfriend-like virtual companionship experience built entirely to their specifications, OurDream.ai's customizable virtual partner system is the strongest in its price range.

**Virtual companionship through AI technology.** The platform uses AI technology to simulate meaningful human connection through conversation, shared memory, and responsive behavior. For users seeking virtual companionship, the combination of unlimited chat and adaptive memory creates a coherent ongoing relationship with a customizable AI companion.

**Role-playing and exploring fantasies.** The 29 relationship types and role-playing scenarios enable users to explore fantasies within a judgment-free environment without per-message limits.

**Both art styles.** Realistic visuals and anime-style appearances are both supported, which is not standard across competitors. Users who prefer anime aesthetics are not forced onto a separate platform.

**Community library.** 7 million user-created dream companions are available to browse and interact with. This library of personalized AI companions reduces setup time for users who want to explore before creating their own.

## Where OurDream.ai Falls Short

**No free trial.** There is no meaningful way to evaluate the platform without paying. The $9.99 entry point on the yearly plan is a notable barrier for new users.

**Web-only access.** No iOS or Android app means the experience is tied to a browser. For something as personal as an AI companion, many users prefer native mobile access.

**Dreamcoin limits on generation.** While chat is unlimited, image and video generation depletes your monthly dreamcoin allowance. Monthly plan users (1,000 coins) who generate content frequently will hit limits.

**No PayPal support.** A specific but real gap for a significant number of users.

**No photo uploads.** The right policy for preventing abuse, but it is a limitation if you want to create a companion based on a specific reference image.

## Who Should Use OurDream.ai?

OurDream.ai fits users who want detailed character control and are prepared to commit to a subscription without trying first. The breadth of customization — 135 occupations, 29 relationship types, 19 voices — is genuinely strong at the $9.99/month yearly price point.

It works less well if you want to test before buying, need a mobile app, rely on PayPal, or prioritize voice calls as the primary interaction mode.

## OurDream.ai Alternatives

If OurDream.ai does not match what you need, there are solid alternatives.

For a different kind of AI companion experience — one focused on conversation depth and human connection rather than browsing a catalog of user-built dream companions — [Pleasur.ai](https://pleasur.ai) is worth trying. It is built specifically for adult AI companion interactions with a focus on making conversation feel natural and consistent.

If you want a comparison of the larger field, our [best AI girlfriend app guide](https://pleasur.ai/blog/best-ai-girlfriend-app-2026) covers the top options in depth.

## The Verdict

OurDream.ai is a solid AI companion platform with the deepest character customization tools in its price range. The unlimited chat, dual art styles, community dream companion library, and voice calls included in both tiers are all real strengths.

The main gaps are the absence of a free trial, web-only access, and the dreamcoin system that caps how much image and video generation you can do each month.

If the customization depth is what you are after, OurDream.ai delivers it. If you want to try before committing, or want a different kind of AI companion experience that prioritizes conversation quality and human connection, [Pleasur.ai](https://pleasur.ai) is the alternative to look at first.
